title: Fukuyama, Hiroshima — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Fukuyama, Hiroshima: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Fukuyama is a city in Hiroshima with a population of 465,000. A historic castle city on the Seto Inland Sea with a well-preserved castle, rose gardens, and a strong manufacturing base.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
